commit.message:
fix: EmberOverlay uses position:fixed for full-viewport coverage

Root cause: position:absolute inside DeckBuilder's nested scroll
chain (flex → overflow-hidden → absolute → overflow-y-auto → step)
made the overlay only cover content height and scroll with it.

Fix: EmberOverlay and its glow now use position:fixed (viewport-
relative). Particles use window.innerWidth/Height for sizing.
Step components no longer need position:relative wrappers — just
render EmberOverlay as a sibling via fragment.

Documented the pattern and root cause in pitfalls.md.

ci: CI上でスクリーンショットを自動生成するように対応 (#5)

* ci: CI上でスクリーンショットを自動生成するように対応

- capture.gd: キャプチャ前に既存の出力ディレクトリのPNGを全削除する _clear_output_dir() を追加
- CI: 最新Godotをダウンロードし、headlessモードでスクリーンショットを生成するステップを追加
- .gitignore: tests/vr_screenshots/ をIgnoreに追加（CI生成物はgit管理不要）
- tests/vr_screenshots/: コミット済みスクリーンショットを削除（CIで毎回生成するため不要）

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JHqiafsF5Do2riJ1oNo2Mz

* fix(ci): --headless を --display-driver headless に変更してVulkanレンダリングを有効化

--headless は内部で --rendering-driver dummy を強制するため、
SubViewport のテクスチャ取得が失敗していた。
--display-driver headless に変更することでレンダリングドライバの
指定が有効になり、Vulkanでの実レンダリングが可能になる。

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JHqiafsF5Do2riJ1oNo2Mz

* fix(ci): xvfb + OpenGL3 に切り替えてスクリーンショット取得を修正

headless display server + Vulkan の組み合わせはCI環境でVulkanの
初期化に失敗してdummyレンダラーにフォールバックしていた。
xvfb-run で仮想X11ディスプレイを用意し、Mesa ソフトウェア
レンダリング (opengl3) を使うことで実際のレンダリングが可能になる。

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JHqiafsF5Do2riJ1oNo2Mz

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: comprehensive QMKL study with BO, 20 kernels, scaling to 12 qubits

New notebook 06_comprehensive_study.ipynb:
- 14 figures covering method comparison, BO convergence, scaling,
  concentration analysis, weight heatmaps, radar charts, and more
- 6 MKL methods compared: Single-Best, Average, Centered, SDP, Projection, BO
- 3 datasets: german_credit, bank_marketing, synthetic
- Scaling study: n_qubits = [2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12]
- BO sensitivity analysis: n_calls = [15, 30, 50, 80]
- Fidelity vs Projected kernel comparison

feature_maps.py:
- Add get_extended_feature_map_library() with 20 kernels
  (3 alphas per type, full entanglement ZZ variants)

bayesian_optimizer.py:
- Add get_convergence_history() for plotting convergence curves
- Add get_weight_trajectory() for analyzing BO exploration

visualization.py:
- Add 6 new plot functions: method_comparison_grouped, bo_convergence,
  weight_heatmap, scaling_curve, concentration_scatter, radar_chart

commit.message:
fix(currency-input): resolve CSS overflow causing currency symbol to disappear on tab

Root cause: The wrapper had `overflow-hidden` with a fixed `w-44` width. When the input
contained longer formatted numbers (e.g., "20.000"), flex layout could cause the currency
span to be cropped during navigation.

Changes:
- Removed `overflow-hidden` from wrapper div
- Added `min-w-0` to input for proper flex shrinking behavior
- Removed debug logging and unused imports
- Added eslint-disable for setState-in-effect with justification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

  stale closures in timers/intervals from ignoring mute state

Redesign article typography: Pretendard font + full readability overhaul

- Add Pretendard Variable font (Korean-optimized)
- word-break: keep-all globally
- Article: font-size 1.05rem, line-height 2.0, letter-spacing Korean-optimized
- H2: left-border accent + subtle background highlight
- H3: left border accent
- Blockquotes: callout box style
- Tables: full redesign with hover, rounded corners, green header
- lab-card / lab-formula-box / lab-graph-wrapper: polished styles
- Post list cards: hover lift + shadow
- Mobile table responsiveness

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Per-draw snapshots: standalone CSV + metadata after every draw

Each checkpoint now also produces a clean, deduplicated final CSV and
metadata JSON. The metadata records:
- n_bootstrap_completed: actual draws finished so far
- n_bootstrap: total requested draws
- complete: true only when all draws are done

This means results are immediately usable if a job is killed early.
The dispatcher checks "complete": true in metadata before marking a
job as done, so partial snapshots don't prevent re-queuing.

수정 사항:
- AGP 8.0.0 → 8.2.1 (compileSdk 34 공식 지원)
- Gradle 8.0.2 → 8.2.1 (AGP 8.2.1 요구사항)

- gradle.properties: android.suppressUnsupportedCompileSdk=35 추가
- versionCode 203, versionName 2.0.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add LCNA-INC-2026-008 validation report: luckycommon OpenSearch RED event

Validates original 2026-03-08 incident report against CloudWatch metrics.
Verdict: Scenario C — RED event isolated, but original report omitted 4
additional YELLOW node drop events spanning 162 minutes across 03/07–03/09.

Key findings:
- "Single isolated RED event" → PARTIALLY TRUE (RED isolated; node instability not)
- "No prior ES alerts in 7 days" → FALSE (Events 1 & 2 within 29 hours prior)
- "Node drop 7→6 for 1 minute" → CONFIRMED for Event 3
- "~41 GB ISM deletion" → SUPPORTED by doc count evidence
- "Search latency 8.1ms" → CONFIRMED (measured 8.13ms)

Actions: R1 IAM grant for databasecheck, R2 ISM audit, R3 report addendum,
R4 stagger ISM deletions with 4h+ gap.

commit.message:
feat(state): continuous state externalization to survive context compaction (v3.10.4)

New lib/state.sh writes ORCHESTRATOR_STATE.md at key lifecycle moments
(agent launch, status poll, merge) so reinject-context.sh has a fresh
snapshot when Claude Code compacts the session. Reduces the gap between
last known state and compaction to ~30s instead of losing all in-flight
reasoning.

Kvm tuning guide (#3196)

* Add KVM/libvirt performance tuning guide for Rocky Linux

Covers NUMA topology, vm.min_free_kbytes dangers, vCPU pinning, CPU isolation,
tuned profiles, GPU passthrough with IOMMU/VFIO, slow boot diagnosis, and
hugepage configuration. Tested on Rocky Linux 8.10, 9.7, and 10.1.

Refs: CUSP-2078

  kernel.org and libvirt.org sources (no Red Hat references)
- Fix vfio_virqfd merge version (upstream kernel 6.2, not 5.14)
- Fix rcu_nocbs description (kthreads, not directly to housekeeping CPUs)
- Fix numatune strict mode behavior (OOM killer, not clean startup failure)
- Fix vm.min_free_kbytes terminology (lowmem zones, not all memory zones)
- Remove specific kernel version 5.14.0-558.el9 (unverifiable)

Assisted-by: Claude claude-sonnet-4-6

* Fix vfio_virqfd note based on hardware testing

Testing on 192.168.1.102 with NVIDIA RTX A2000 confirmed:
- Rocky 8.10 (kernel 4.18): vfio_virqfd is a separate module
- Rocky 9.7 (kernel 5.14): vfio_virqfd merged into vfio (RHEL backport)
- Rocky 10.1 (kernel 6.12): vfio_virqfd merged into vfio

Also tested on hardware: IOMMU group listing, GPU hostdev XML,
X-PciMmio64Mb syntax, modprobe/dracut configs, and complete
domain XML definition with libvirt.

commit.message:
fix: use configured hostname in gh_project auth refresh hint

Replace hardcoded `github.com` in check_project_scopes() with the
host from .purser.yml config, supporting GitHub Enterprise Server.

Closes: purser-2y8

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: purser
repository.description: Unified agentic AI development framework combining Ralph Loop with Beads issue tracking

commit.message:
✨ Add map editing, library browser, and UI polish

- Add PATCH endpoint for updating map slot/mod
- Inline slot dropdown on slot badge click
- Edit dialog for slot + mod changes
- Check Library in Add Map dialog with search and pagination
- Editable slot keys in Slots Editor
- 3xN grid for slot selection, 1xN for mods
- Star rating as black chip, fix mod icon visibility
- Stage onboarding with Add Stage button
- Remove pack count from sidebar

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
